name: Embedded Rust tools
description: Cargo crates commonly needed for embedded Rust development: cargo-binstall, cargo-generate, flip-link, and probe-rs-tools. Depends on the official rust feature; install that first.

githubToken.description: Optional GitHub token. cargo-binstall queries api.github.com to find release artefacts; anonymous calls are limited to 60/hr per IP. Pass via "${localEnv:GITHUB_TOKEN}" in devcontainer.json to dodge the limit on shared/CI builds.
